subject: NVIDIA RTX A5000 and Warp 1.1-beta compatibility
body:
Dear Warp Community,

Can anybody confirm or deny whether Warp 1.1-beta works with Ada Lovelace
GPUs? In particular A5000s would be of interest, but 40-series GPUs would
be fine too.

I remember the 1.1-beta introduced compatbility for the "newer" cards but I
believe that was when the 30-series were kicking around?

Thanks in advance!
Shintaro
